raw_consumer_statement:
Starting on XX/XX/year>, I was fraudulently charged by a merchant named XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX I initially purchased a software package for {$1.00}, but I was charged {$56.00} without my authorization. Following this, I was charged twice per month for varying amounts : {$19.00} and {$98.00}, on the same day each month. These unauthorized charges continued on XX/XX/XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX I did not agree to any of these recurring charges beyond the initial {$1.00} offer. I did not receive the " {$1.00} '' software package, and I was never charged {$1.00}. 

I have contacted the merchant multiple times via email and phone but have received no response. They provided my credit card company, Barclays, with fake documentation, including a fabricated Terms of Service and refund policy, which I can prove through screenshots showing the URLs provided by the merchant lead to 404 errors ( pages that dont exist ). Additionally, they have not provided any valid proof of authorization for these recurring charges. 

I filed disputes with Barclays three times, but they have sided with the merchant each time, despite the clear evidence of unauthorized charges and the fabricated documentation. I have also submitted complaints to the Wyoming Attorney General 's office about this merchant. 

I request that all these unauthorized charges be removed from my account and that Barclays conduct a thorough investigation.
